title: 2026 Oscars Best Picture Predictions
text: One Battle After Another enters the ceremony as the frontrunner after securing major awards including the Directors Guild, Producers Guild, Critics Choice Awards, and Golden Globes. The film stars Leonardo DiCaprio and appears positioned to dominate the technical categories as well. Despite its strength, the Best Picture category remains genuinely competitive. The article notes that ranked choice voting creates unusual dynamics where voters list nominees in order of preference rather than selecting a single choice. This mechanism has historically produced surprises, including when Moonlight defeated La La Land in 2017. Ryan Coogler's Sinners, featuring Michael B. Jordan, remains a legitimate challenger. The film has won the Golden Globe and Actors Award, and the author acknowledges a Sinners win would also be pretty fantastic. This could occur if the film achieves strong consensus across voter preferences rather than leading first-choice selections. The article identifies If I Had Legs I'd Kick You as an undeserving omission from the Best Picture field.
